rationale: Educ. Code §12.029 governs school district status following annexation or consolidation. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 12.029. STATUS OF DISTRICT IN CASE OF ANNEXATION OR CONSOLIDATION.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict identified.
